description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the closest 4.5+ star standard oil change under $70 for next Saturday morning
tasks.description: Schedule a standard oil change priced under $70 at the closest location with a rating of at least 4.5 stars within the ZIP 30301 area, for next Saturday between 9:00–11:00 AM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Locations” link in the main navigation menu.
In the ZIP code search field, type “30301” and click the search button.
In the filters panel, set the rating filter to show locations with ratings of 4.5 stars or higher.
From the results list sorted by distance, click on the first location (the closest one that meets the 4.5+ rating filter).
On the location page, click the “Schedule Service” or “Book Appointment” button.
On the services list, click the “Standard Oil Change” option that shows a listed price under $70.
In the date picker, navigate to next Saturday and click that date.
From the available time slots for that Saturday, click the earliest time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
Click the “Book Appointment” or “Confirm Appointment” button to submit the booking.

tasks.name: Apply a 15%+ brake service coupon to a front brake pad replacement and go to checkout
tasks.description: Find a brake service coupon offering at least 15% off, apply it to a front brake pad replacement service priced under $350, and proceed to the checkout summary.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Coupons & Deals” option in the main navigation.
On the coupons page, use the category filter to select the “Brakes” category.
From the list of brake-related coupons, click on the first coupon that displays a discount of 15% or higher.
On the coupon details page, click the “Apply Coupon to Service” button.
On the services list that appears, click on the “Front Brake Pad Replacement” service.
If multiple package options are shown, click the package for front brake pad replacement that lists a price under $350 before discount.
Click the “Add to Cart with Coupon” or similar button to add the discounted service to your cart.
Click the cart icon in the header and then click the “View Cart” or “Proceed to Checkout” button to go to the checkout summary page.

tasks.name: Select the 2018 Honda Civic maintenance plan with the longest warranty under $50/month
tasks.description: For a 2018 Honda Civic, compare the first two maintenance plans and choose the plan that has the longer warranty duration while keeping the monthly cost under $50, then add that plan to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Maintenance Plans” option in the main navigation.
In the vehicle selection section, choose “2018” for Year, “Honda” for Make, and “Civic” for Model from the dropdown menus.
Click the “Show Plans” or “View Plans” button to display available maintenance plans.
In the list of plans, click the comparison checkbox next to the first plan and then click the comparison checkbox next to the second plan.
Click the “Compare Selected” button to open the comparison view for those two plans.
In the comparison view, identify which of the two plans lists the longer warranty period while showing a monthly price under $50, then click the “Select Plan” button for that plan.
On the selected plan’s detail page, click the “Add Annual Plan to Cart” or “Enroll in Plan” button.
Click the “Proceed to Checkout” or “Go to Cart” button to move to the cart or checkout page with the chosen plan.

tasks.name: Request an engine diagnostics quote with the earliest morning drop-off within 3 days
tasks.description: Submit a quote request for an engine diagnostics/check engine light service at the nearest location to ZIP 60601, choosing a drop-off time between 8:00–10:00 AM on the earliest available date within the next 3 days.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Request a Quote” or “Get a Quote” option in the main navigation.
In the service type dropdown, select “Engine Diagnostics / Check Engine Light.”
In the location or ZIP field, type “60601” and select the nearest suggested location from the dropdown or results list.
Under visit type options, click on “Drop-off (Leave car)” or the equivalent drop-off option.

In the date and time selector, choose the earliest date within the next 3 days that shows available time slots between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM, then click on the first available time slot in that 8:00–10:00 AM window.
In the contact form, enter the name “Alex Rivera,” phone number “555-234-7890,” and email address “alex@example.com” into the appropriate fields.
In the issue description text area, type “Check engine light has been on for 3 days; car runs rough at idle.”
Click the “Submit Quote Request” button to send the request.

tasks.name: Book the cheapest same-day flat tire repair after 6 PM at a shop open past 7 PM
tasks.description: For ZIP 94110, find a flat tire repair service appointment for today at a location that closes at or after 7:00 PM, and select the lowest-priced available time slot after 6:00 PM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Services” link in the main navigation menu.
On the services page, select the “Tires & Wheels” category.
Click on the “Flat Tire Repair / Puncture Repair” service from the list.
On the service detail page, enter ZIP code “94110” into the location field and click the search button for today’s availability.
Use the filters for the location results to show only locations with a closing time of 7:00 PM or later today.
From the filtered locations, identify the location showing the lowest listed price for flat tire repair and click its “View Times” or “Book” button.

In the time slot selection for that location, choose the lowest-priced available time slot after 6:00 PM today (if all time slots are the same price, select the earliest time slot that starts after 6:00 PM).
Click the “Continue” or “Confirm Appointment” button to complete the booking.

tasks.name: Schedule a 30,000-mile service with free shuttle within 5 miles under $200
tasks.description: From ZIP 75201, choose a location that offers a free shuttle service up to 5 miles, schedule a 30,000-mile maintenance service priced under $200, and select the free shuttle option with a specific pickup address.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Locations” option in the main navigation.
In the search field, enter ZIP code “75201” and click the search button.
In the filters section, enable or check the option labeled “Offers free shuttle service” or similar.
From the filtered results, select a location that indicates a shuttle radius of “Up to 5 miles” and click on its name to open the location details page.
On that location’s page, click the “Schedule Service” or “Book Now” button.
From the list of available services, select the “30,000-Mile Maintenance” package that shows a price under $200.
On the transportation or additional options step, select the “Free Shuttle Ride” option and type “123 Main St, Dallas, TX 75201” into the shuttle pickup address field.
Click the “Book Appointment with Shuttle” or equivalent button to finalize the appointment.

tasks.name: Purchase a $100 email-delivery gift card and proceed to checkout
tasks.description: Buy a $100 gift card set for email delivery by filling in sender and recipient details, add it to the cart, and navigate to the checkout page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Gift Cards” link in the main navigation or footer.
On the gift cards page, select the “Email Gift Card” delivery option.
In the amount options, click on the preset “$100” amount button.
In the recipient information section, enter “Jordan Lee” as the recipient name and “jordan@example.com” as the recipient email.
In the sender information section, enter “Pat Morgan” as the sender name and “pat@example.com” as the sender email.
In the personal message text box, type “Happy birthday! Use this for your next service.”
Click the “Add Gift Card to Cart” button.
Click the cart icon in the header and then click the “Proceed to Checkout” button to go to the checkout page.

tasks.name: Set up 3-month maintenance reminders for a 2020 Toyota Camry via email and SMS
tasks.description: Create a maintenance reminder schedule for a 2020 Toyota Camry with current mileage of 25,000, assuming 10,000 miles per year, with reminders every 3 months and notifications sent by both email and SMS.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Maintenance Reminders” or “Sign Up for Reminders” link in the main navigation or footer.
In the vehicle form, select “2020” for Year, “Toyota” for Make, and “Camry” for Model from the dropdown menus.
In the current mileage field, type “25000” as the current odometer reading.
In the driving habits or annual mileage dropdown, select “10,000 miles per year.”
In the reminder frequency options, select “Every 3 months.”
In the contact preferences section, check both the “Email” and “Text Message (SMS)” checkboxes.
Fill in the contact fields with the name “Morgan Patel,” email “morgan@example.com,” mobile number “555-987-6543,” and ZIP code “85001.”
Click the “Create Reminder Schedule” or “Save and Activate Reminders” button to submit the reminder setup.
